titleStmt.title: SII 8.304: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 304. (A.R. No. 31 of 1903). ON ANOTHER PILLAR OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara
nāmātu Iḷaṅkac cayamātu nilavat tantirupata
malar mannavar cūṭa manniya vurimaiyil maṇimu
ṭi cūṭic ceṅkol cenṟu ticaitoṟum
vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟan ta
ḻaippak kaliṅka miriyak kaṭamalai yutai
ttu valaṅko ḷāḻivarai yāḻi naṭātti I
rucuṭaraḷavummorukuṭai niḻaṟṟa virasiṁhā
sanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟi
run=taruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tiripuvana
ccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻatevarkku yā
ṇṭu 6.vatu Irājarājavaḷanāṭṭut tirumuṉaippāṭik ka
yavapākkaināṭṭu brahmateyam Akkaḷaneṉmaṭic
caruppetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom nila vilai
yāvaṇam . Ivvūr tiruviṇṇakarāḻvār koyi
lile kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyirun=tu Eṅkaḷūrkkuk
kuṟaivāy Ūrviniyokattukku Eṅkaḷūrile ciṟitu
nilam viṟṟākilum Ūrviniyokattukku veṇṭuva
tāy Iṉṉāṭṭuk kiḻāṉmurnāṭṭu Ātirājamaṅkal
liyapurattu śrīkovin=taviṇṇakar ninṟaruḷiṉa parama
svāmikaḷukku tiruvattacāmattukku ciṟṟāmurruṭaiyaār tirukka
ḻippālait tillaināyakan kāṅkeyaṉ Eṅkaḷpakkal
koṇṭuviṭṭa nilamāvatu Ivvūr vaṭakaḻani
Arumoḻitevaṉvāykkālukku vaṭakku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk
kuṭukkiṟa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai Ātirājamaṅkal
liyapurattu murukaṭiviṇṇakarāḻvār tevatānattu
kkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai paramecuvaravāy
kkālukkut teṟkum Āka Iṉnānkellaiyilum
naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam patinālaṭikkolāl kuḻi 7 100 5 10
7 100 5 10 Ivvellaikkuḷḷut tenkiḻaimulaiyi
ṟ kuḷamuṅ karaiyum dānamākak kuṭuttom mahā
sabhaiyom muṟcollappaṭṭa kuḻi Eḻunūṟ ṟaimpatum
Ittevarṟkut tiruvattacāmappuṟamāka can=ti rātitta
var śāśvatikamāka Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭuttu Innilat
tukku
Digital edition of SII 8.304 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
